transcript.text:
Hello everyone
For today,
I prepared steak tartare and cold noodles
I think it's been about a year
Since I did the steak tartare and spicy cold noodles mukbang
But today, I have the spicy cold chewy noodles
Dumplings are here as a snack(?)
More like a dessert
I'll put some more broth
The noodles.. Looking delicious
Maybe I should've ordered the one with the broth
It's so good
It's been so long Well because the cold noodles aren't popular in the Winter
But that's when it tastes good
Bon appetit
This combination tastes even better

Is it because of their noodles? So good
This is even better
Pop the yolk
With the egg yolk
This looks like I'm just eating tartare
It's not bland
Maybe because of the beef?
So good
Shrimp dumpling
It's been a while
But really
The normal noodles go well with steak tartare
And also with the chewy noodles
[Chat: I would've been disappointed if you didn't eat the shrimp's tail]
Most people don't eat it, right? I used to always eat them
I didn't eat it for a bit, and now I'm back to eating it

Dumpling
With chewy noodles
I cut my bangs wrong
Should I just split?
My bangs..
Are too short
I want to save the yolk, but it needs to be popped
Looks tasty
I almost blew on the noodles
I have apple juice as a drink
I forgot I had young radish kimchi
[Chat: My stomach is growling now]
I will wake up with a swollen face from eating at this hour
I gain weight on my face as I grow older
In the mornings
Like an Anpanman

[Chat: How many servings of noodles?] This should be about 5 servings
The king dumplings? These need to be eating with bare hands
It's not hot anymore Kimchi dumpling
The ones in the front are pork
Not bad
Something is spicy
Is it the noodles?
I'm not that bad with spicy foods
I can tolerate some spiciness
I don't think I've ever seen a restaurant that sells chewy noodles and steak tartare together
Spicy
[Chat: A huge bite of the tartare please] That's such a waste
I'm saving it
Okay fine
With the egg yolk
When did this pop? I was supposed to do it

What a waste!
Wasteful
I shouldn't have done that It's almost gone now
So spicy though
Did I order this as a spicy level?
Yes I did
I must eat this boiled egg
I only put 1 boiled egg because this is meal is for 1 person
The number of bowls does not define servings for me
[Chat: Spicy foods will ruin your stomach] It's okay
Wait, it's not okay This is too spicy
[Chat: Dumplings please]
Pork?
Yummy
To be honest,
I want to have a cold chewy noodle broth machine here in my room

I can also put plum juice and apple juice in there as a slush
That'd be nice
[Chat: Something is different about you]
The shorter bangs
And maybe eyebrows?
No, it's not tatted I must have put too much eyebrow makeup
It's tasty but too spicy
My head hurts
[Chat: Sauce on your chin]
I was saving it for later
You put me on the spot!
Spicy cold noodles last time
Today is with the chewy noodles
Steak tartare goes well with any noodles
I need to cool down really quick
These dumplings are great

[Chat: Which one do you prefer? Kimchi dumplings or pork dumplings?] How about you guys?
For me..
I used to like kimchi dumplings more But pork dumplings are better nowadays
Wait, that's not it
Only about 1 serving left
It will be gone soon
It's just spicy
[Chat: Why am I getting full?] Are you really?
The sauce is spicy
Delicious
The steak tartare is amazing
[Chat: I don't like steak tartare, but I'm still watching it]
To put it into perspective, it's like me watching a carrot mukbang
That's horrifying
Dumpling
I don't think it's a good idea for me to date someone that eats more than me

If I had to pick, I prefer someone that can't eat too much
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
